system.requirement: If you aim a ranged weapon from afar…

abilities.description: When you target a minor foe from a distance (outside of a fight), roll +wits. On a strong hit, you take them out. Take +1 momentum. If other foes remain and you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} against them, make progress. On a weak hit, as above, but you sacrifice time or position; @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} (-1). On a miss, you draw attention or face reprisal; @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.78baa51694fe37c5]{Pay the Price}

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} from a distance with time enough to line up your shot, you may roll +wits. If you do, mark progress on a hit.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} by studying a distant situation though your spyglass, or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} by taking careful aim, you may sacrifice time for greater certainty. If you do (decide before rolling), @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} (-1, -2, or -3) and add that amount. Then, take +1 momentum on a strong hit.
